examples.title: Basic code block
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { CodeBlock } from 'cinder/code-block';
  const code = `function greet(name: string): string {
  return \`Hello, \${name}!\`;
}

const message = greet('world');`;
</script>

<CodeBlock {code} />

examples.title: With language label and copy
examples.description: Header shows the language and a copy-to-clipboard button.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { codeToHtml } from 'shiki';
  import { CodeBlock } from 'cinder/code-block';
  const code = `SELECT id, name, created_at
FROM users
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;`;

  async function highlighter(source: string, lang: string): Promise<string> {
    return codeToHtml(source, { lang, theme: 'github-light' });
  }
</script>

<CodeBlock {code} language="sql" copyable {highlighter} />
